title: The Swearing of Allegiance to al-Mukhtar in al-Basrah
description: a]-Basrah] According to Abu Ja`far [sc. al-Tabari]: In this year, al-Muthanna b. Mukharribah al-Abdi summoned the people of al-Basrah to swear allegiance to al-Mukhtar. According to Ahmad b. Zuhayr178-Ali b. Muhammad (alMada'ini]179-Abdallah b. Atiyyah al-Laythi and Amir b. alAswad: Al-Muthanna b. Mukharribah al-`Abdi was among those who had witnessed [the Battle of ] 'Ayn al-Wardah with Sulayman b. $urad. Afterwards, he returned with the surviving Tawwabun who returned to al-Kufah. Al-Mukhtar was then being detained.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 21
